title: EarthLand Stories: Cobblemon
description: The official modpack for EarthLand Stories: Cobblemon. It mainly features Cobblemon as well as a plethora of community-made addons, but it also contains QoL tweaks for multiplayer.
body:
This modpack is a collection of mods designed for a private SMP, but still makes for a fun singleplayer adventure.

---
- Venture into the world of Pokémon with [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)!
- Fill the world with **hundreds** of friends thanks to mods such as [HiddenMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hiddenmons-cobblemon), [GenoMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/genomons), [MissingMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/missingmons-cobblemon), and MORE!
- Explore the world with [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)!
- Eat yummy food from mods such as [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) and its various addons!
- Build a better world with mods like [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted) and [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)!
- Stay in the moment thanks to [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks-(unoffical-fabric-port))!
- ...and much, _much_ more!

---
As stated before, this modpack is designed to be played with many players. While it is fully enjoyable in singleplayer, there's lots of great qualities better with friends!
- Adventure into the great unknown with your buddies with [Cobblemounts](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemounts)!
- Take on your own Gym League with [BadgeBox](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-badgebox)!
- ...and much, _much_ more!
